name: gym-catgirl-coach
description: Local WeChat catgirl fitness assistant for macOS

scripts.test:message: node src/index.js message "97.8" && node src/index.js message "午饭鸡腿饭和拿铁" && node src/index.js message "练完了，卧推22.5 10 9 8，RPE 8"
scripts.test:reminder: node src/index.js reminder morning_checkin --force && node src/index.js reminder lunch --force && node src/index.js reminder training_card --force && node src/index.js reminder evening_summary --force
